marketplace.registrationDesc: Detailed information can only be viewed after registration. Do you want to register?

safety.title: Safety First
safety.subtitle: Please read our safety guidelines before contacting professionals.
safety.do1: Meet in a public place or with others present.
safety.do2: Pay only AFTER the service is fully completed.
safety.do3: Verify the expert's identity upon arrival.
safety.do4: Keep all communication within the Joyida app.
safety.dont1: Do not pay an advance or deposit.
safety.dont2: Do not share your personal financial details.
safety.dont3: Avoid meeting in isolated dark areas.
safety.dont4: Don't ignore your intuition - safety first!

chat.safety_tip: Joyida Safety Tip: Do not pay in advance. Pay only after service completion.
